items.name_en: Full metal hardware, top-tier original sample, code-changing chip. Gaston-Louis Vuitton's 1932 champagne bag meets contemporary trends, transforming into the NéoNoé bucket bag, embodying heritage beauty. Monogram canvas outlines soft lines, paired with colored leather trim and matching multi-layered glued lining. Monogram coated canvas - smooth calfskin trim - microfiber lining - center zip pocket - detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!!
items.name_cn:
Full metal hardware, top-tier original sample, code-changing chip. Gaston-Louis Vuitton's 1932 champagne bag meets contemporary trends, transforming into the NéoNoé bucket bag, embodying heritage beauty. Monogram canvas outlines soft lines, paired with colored leather trim and matching multi-layered glued lining. Monogram coated canvas - smooth calfskin trim - microfiber lining - center zip pocket - detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!!
M44887 Caramel M44020 Black
M44021 Red M44022 Pink
Size: 26x26x17.5CM

items.name_en: Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
items.name_cn:
Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
Full name: Classic Flap 1112 Large Ball, Grainy Ball Pattern
Size: 15.5*25.5*6.5cm
Leather: Original Haas Large Ball Caviar interior, imported lambskin
Hardware: 24K plated, all steel hardware
The classic CF has an irresistible charm, serving as a mobile label of elegance wherever you go. The pure white exudes an elegant and gentle goddess vibe, paired with a gold buckle for exquisite luxury. It is truly a must-have entry-level luxury item~

items.name_en: Full steel hardware 👻 Top-tier original batch 😻 changed code chip 💯 Model: M12099 Black Small Double-sided Shopping Bag ❣️❣️ Neverfull Bandoulière Inside Out BB Handbag. This season's interpretation of a classic double-sided design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The removable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. The detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while the dazzling metal hardware adds refined details.
